---
title: 'Star Wars Storytelling... No Spoilers'
date: '2019-12-24T08:18:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3557961543084958938'
blogger_filename: '/2019/12/star-wars-storytelling-no-spoilers.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

I won't give anything away, I don't think... But the latest Star Wars IX was the best ever produced.&nbsp;<div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1577175475944600-0-143daa7b793b.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1577175475944600-0-143daa7b793b.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><b>Meme</b>, Author Unknown<br><div><br></div><div>Although they gave a nod to the previous franchise, closing it out in satisfying ways, they also used one of THE most powerful Storyteller tricks ever created... "First, break all the rules".&nbsp;<br></div><div><br></div><div>It felt like the first time a Star Wars movie ever gave me a good story, an actual story. It was still a Star Wars movie. It was bound by decades of tradition and broken story loops. But it was the best story one could have told with the source material given.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>And now it's cleaned up and ready for a new birth that could take it in satisfying directions the old franchise never could have told.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Which makes me think about my own story... Have I made a clean cut with my old life while bringing forward the best of the legacy, like my kids?&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Have I remembered to First Break All The Rules?&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>The only rules I need carry into the next leg of my journey are those I developed along the way that served me well. Those rules that kept me back can be discarded.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Selah.</div></div>
